name: Sante Fe Grilled Beef Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 can Diced tomatoes with Garlic and Onion (14.5 oz)
1 can Golden Sweet Corn, whole kernel (15.25 oz), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the ground cumin over the flank steak.
2. Season with salt and pepper, if desired.
3. Grill or broil the meat to your preferred doneness:
- 6-8 minutes for medium rare
- 8-10 minutes for medium
- 10-12 minutes for well done (turn once).
4. Combine the diced tomatoes, corn, salsa, green bell pepper, and sliced onions.
5. Slice the meat thinly and serve over the vegetables.
6. Serve with lime wedges and cilantro, if desired.
